core.label: Smalltalk Fundamentals
core.description: Pure OOP, message passing, and the live environment.

topics.label: Pharo Setup
topics.description: Install Pharo — the modern Smalltalk. Everything is an object, including classes and blocks.

topics.label: Objects & Messages
topics.description: Everything is an object, everything is a message send. obj message: arg.

topics.label: Classes & Inheritance
topics.description: Define classes in the browser. Single inheritance from Object.

topics.label: Blocks (Closures)
topics.description: [:x | x + 1] — blocks are anonymous functions. Foundation of control flow.

topics.label: Collections
topics.description: OrderedCollection, Array, Dictionary, Set. Rich collection hierarchy.

topics.label: Control Flow via Messages
topics.description: ifTrue:ifFalse:, whileTrue:, do:, collect:, select:. No keywords for control flow.

topics.label: The Image & Workspace
topics.description: Smalltalk runs in a persistent image. Code lives in the image, not files.

topics.label: Debugging & Inspector
topics.description: Live debugging — modify running code. Smalltalk's debugger is legendary.
